projects.title: Mosaic
projects.description: A collaborative design tool that lets teams create, annotate, and ship design systems together. Built with real-time sync using CRDTs and a canvas-based rendering engine.
projects.longDescription: Mosaic reimagines how design teams collaborate. With live multi-cursor editing, component versioning, and a built-in token system, teams can go from concept to production-ready specs in record time.

projects.title: Groundwork
projects.description: An open-source infrastructure-as-code library for spinning up production-ready cloud environments on AWS and GCP with a single config file.
projects.longDescription: Groundwork abstracts the complexity of cloud setup into a human-readable YAML schema. One file, one command — and you have VPCs, databases, queues, and CI/CD pipelines ready to go.

projects.title: Lumen
projects.description: A minimal, privacy-first analytics platform for indie developers. No cookies, no GDPR headaches — just clean dashboards and actionable metrics.
projects.longDescription: Built as an alternative to bloated analytics suites. Lumen uses fingerprinting techniques that respect user privacy while still giving developers the data they need to improve their products.

projects.title: Threadline
projects.description: A social reading app that turns newsletters and articles into shared, annotatable experiences — like Kindle highlights, but for the web.
projects.longDescription: Threadline adds a social layer to reading. Highlight a passage, see what others thought, and follow readers with great taste. Integrations with major newsletter platforms make it easy to import subscriptions.
